title: National Citizen Service Trust annual report and accounts 2024 to 2025
body: "On 12 November 2024 the Secretary of State for Culture, Media and Sport announced the government’s intention to wind down the National Citizen Service (NCS) programmes from the end of financial year 2024/2025 and to close the National Citizen Service Trust (the body which delivered NCS programmes). Programme delivery ceased on 31 March 2025 and the National Citizen Service Trust closed on 11 July 2025.  In accordance with requirements in the National Citizen Service Act 2017, the National Citizen Service Trust provided this annual report, which was laid in parliament on 10 July 2025. "
